operating_rule: Phases are maximum budgets, not entitlements. Execute one cheapest discriminator per session. Exit a phase early on its promote or kill condition; terminal evidence enters contribution review immediately. Never use remaining session budget to repeat a failed mechanism.

confidence_calibration.interpretation: Subjective planning probabilities, not mathematical confidence. Meaningful means plausibly satisfying at least one configured field-progress gate after independent validation; external acceptance is stricter.
increase_if: proof cores collapse to at most five human-checkable parameterized types
canonical blocking removes whole classes at least 100 times faster than labelled blocking
a leakage-safe method beats prior-art baselines by at least 2x on held-out controls
a checked cube/profile system certifies a material accepted search-space reduction
decrease_if: proof-core compression misses either predeclared threshold
canonical boundary search continues rediscovering supplied classes after class-level blocking
held-out gains disappear under matched evaluator calls or stronger baselines
no route yields a class/profile/cube-level reduction by session 60

phases.objective: Determine whether the 20 certified two-orbit exclusions compress into a concise structural theorem.
phases.required_artifact: Deletion-minimal raw K5-clause cores, canonical signed-incidence types, deterministic maps for all 20 distances, and a human-readable theorem draft with an instantiation checker.
phases.promote_if: Every distance maps to at most five parameterized core types of at most 20 clauses, with no SAT auxiliaries or unproved symmetry premise.
phases.kill_if: Either threshold fails after exact minimization, or the templates do not yield a shorter human-checkable argument than the finite certificates.

phases.objective: Replace labelled CEGAR blocks in the 426-bit order-42 boundary with sound isomorphism-class or canonical-subproblem blocking.
phases.required_artifact: Canonical augmentation/blocking algorithm, coverage proof or one-sided safety proof, dual checker, and measured class-level reduction ledger.
phases.promote_if: Class/cube blocking yields at least 100x fewer repeated solves than labelled blocking or finds a dual-checked order-42 class absent from the supplied corpus.
phases.kill_if: No sound compact class block exists, or 256 class-level decisions yield only supplied classes without a reusable reduction.

phases.objective: Eliminate many K43 candidates at once using exact degree, codegree, and small-subgraph distribution constraints.
phases.required_artifact: Integer/rational profile system derived from Ramsey identities, independently checked derivation, control-graph tests, and exact count or upper bound on eliminated profiles/cubes.
phases.promote_if: A new sourced inequality or exact filter removes at least 99% of pilot profiles or strengthens a certificate-carrying upper-bound decomposition.
phases.kill_if: Known inequalities subsume the filter, rationalization fails, or the surviving pilot space shrinks by less than 10x.

phases.objective: Test whether canonical trapping-set, linkage, or evolved-search operators improve Ramsey search under leakage-safe matched compute.
phases.required_artifact: Frozen class-level train/validation/test split, simulated-annealing/tabu/current-local-search and published algorithmic baselines, matched evaluator-call and wall-clock budgets, paired seeds, ablations, and exact graph evaluation.
phases.promote_if: At least 2x median held-out time-to-recovery or a statistically robust lower exact K43 burden under matched calls, surviving ablation and a second implementation.
phases.kill_if: Gain is below 25%, disappears on held-out classes, depends on leakage, or loses to an appropriate prior-art baseline.

phases.objective: Turn successful structural/profile reductions into deterministic canonical cubes with checked proof logs and sound coverage.
phases.required_artifact: Generator-to-CNF correspondence, canonical cube cover, checked LRAT/DRAT leaves, independent cover checker, and quantified fraction of an accepted R(5,5) search decomposition.
phases.promote_if: A pilot certifies a material externally intelligible reduction with projected proof size and runtime inside the lab budget.
phases.kill_if: Coverage cannot be independently checked, proof growth extrapolates beyond storage/compute limits, or the cubes cover only another arbitrary local family.

phases.objective: Attack the strongest surviving result, rerun novelty searches, obtain outside evaluation, and close or redirect R55 honestly.
phases.required_artifact: Reproducibility packet, closest-prior comparison, independent validation, named external channel, remaining-gap statement, and next-problem transfer memo.
phases.promote_if: A configured field-progress gate passes the fail-closed contribution review.
phases.kill_if: No gate-worthy result survives isolated review by session 100.
phases.fallback: park R55 and transfer the best verified method to a more tractable Ramsey cell
